title: AI Authoring Request v1
description: Structured request for a single AI-generated artifact.

targetRepo.description: Canonical name of the repository to receive the artifact.

targetPath.description: Repository-relative path of the file to create or update.

schemaRef.description: Canonical schema URI that the payload must validate against.

tier.description: VM-Constellation tier of the target repository.

purpose.description: Short human-readable description of the change.

prismMetaRef.description: Optional reference to a prismMeta profile.
